title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: Our car is being serviced by the mechanic right now.
questions.explanation: Tests causative 'have something done' in the present continuous.
questions.secondSentence: We (1) _________ by the mechanic right now.

questions.firstSentence: ‘You should take up a sport,’ my friend said to me.
questions.explanation: Tests reporting verbs with object + to-infinitive.

questions.firstSentence: I'm sorry I didn't tell you the truth.
questions.explanation: Tests 'wish' + past perfect to express regret about a past situation.

questions.firstSentence: It was possible that they didn't get the message.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect for negative possibility in the past.

questions.firstSentence: I didn't realize it was so late until the lights went out.
questions.explanation: Tests focusing 'It was only when...' structure.
questions.secondSentence: It (1) _________ the lights went out that I realized it was so late.

questions.firstSentence: The restaurant was too crowded for us to find a table.
questions.secondSentence: There (1) _________ for us to find a table.
